creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168375
port files

Ping Identity's mod_auth_openidc Apache module supports OpenID Connect (and also OAuth 2.0) as a relying party.  It exports claims received from the OpenID Connect Provider into the environment and/or request headers so that scripts may take advantage of them, and also implements tests of claims in Apache 2.4's "Require" directive.
